comment: Quality Gates catalog -- docs-repro dimension. Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md. Verifier impl: quality/gates/docs-repro/. Reports: quality/reports/verifications/docs-repro/.

asserts: in a fresh ubuntu:24.04 container with cargo + python3 + curl pre-installed and the workspace cargo build complete, bash examples/01-shell-loop/run.sh exits 0
the run leaves a partial-clone working tree at /tmp/reposix-example-01
the example pushes a commit and the simulator's audit log shows a helper_push_* row

rows.owner_hint: if RED: examples/01-shell-loop/run.sh has a regression OR the simulator/cli/helper changed and the example was not updated; check examples/01-shell-loop/expected-output.md and the binary on PATH preamble

asserts: in a fresh ubuntu:24.04 container, python3 examples/02-python-agent/run.py exits 0
the agent finds 'database' in some issue body and applies a severity label
git push reports success

rows.owner_hint: if RED: examples/02-python-agent/run.py has a regression OR the simulator/cli/helper changed; check the python stdlib-only constraint and the binary on PATH preamble

asserts: examples/03-claude-code-skill/RUN.md exists and references .claude/skills/reposix-agent-flow
examples/03-claude-code-skill/agent-prompt.md exists and parses as markdown
this row is graded by manual verifier-subagent dispatch (not auto-runnable)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: examples/03-claude-code-skill/{RUN.md, agent-prompt.md} got out of sync with .claude/skills/reposix-agent-flow

asserts: bash examples/04-conflict-resolve/run.sh exits 0 in ubuntu:24.04 container
the second agent observes 'fetch first' from helper stderr and recovers via git pull --rebase
after recovery, both edits are merged

rows.owner_hint: if RED: push-time conflict detection regressed; check the helper export-path conflict logic

asserts: bash examples/05-blob-limit-recovery/run.sh exits 0 in ubuntu:24.04 container
the agent observes the blob-limit error from helper stderr and recovers via git sparse-checkout
after recovery, the targeted issue blob is materialized while siblings stay sparse

rows.owner_hint: if RED: blob-limit error message regressed OR sparse-checkout recovery path regressed

asserts: step 2: simulator starts and listens on 127.0.0.1:7878 (or alternate port)
step 3: reposix init sim::demo /tmp/repo exits 0 and configures partial-clone
step 4: git checkout -B main refs/reposix/origin/main exits 0
step 5: 0001.md exists with title: frontmatter
step 7: git push reports [new branch] main -> main
step 8: audit_events_cache has a row with op LIKE 'helper_push_%'

rows.owner_hint: if RED: docs/tutorials/first-run.md or one of the binary build steps regressed; check scripts/repro-quickstart.sh predecessor for the canonical assertions

asserts: docs/benchmarks/latency.md frontmatter last_measured_at is < 30 days old
the cached-read p50 cell value matches the headline 8 ms to within +/-2ms

rows.owner_hint: if RED: docs/benchmarks/latency.md drifted from headline numbers; v0.12.1 perf cross-check (perf/headline-numbers-cross-check) automates this row

asserts: headline 89.1% is greppable from docs/benchmarks/token-economy.md
the comparison fixture file referenced from token-economy.md exists

rows.owner_hint: if RED: docs/benchmarks/token-economy.md drifted from headline numbers; v0.12.1 perf cross-check (perf/headline-numbers-cross-check) automates this row
